name_en: In stock 25c HOBO Bag. A hit this season that caught my eye at first glance. Adjustable chain transforms into a bucket bag. Medium size, very practical. Two small pockets on the front for travel, perfect for phone and passport. Large capacity, looks cool when worn! Dimensions: 30*26*14*cm
